---
name: diagnosing-bugs
description: Investigate a reported defect from symptom to reproducible cause and targeted fix.
---

# Diagnosing Bugs

1. Restate the observed and expected behavior.
2. Reproduce or bound the failure with the smallest useful check.
3. Trace inputs, state, boundaries, and recent changes.
4. Identify the root cause and the narrowest safe fix.
5. Add a regression test or document why one is not feasible.

Report evidence, alternative hypotheses considered, severity, and remaining uncertainty. Do not change unrelated behavior while diagnosing.
